Schedule Your Appointment Today! our expert answers frequently asked questions How frequently should I go to a dermatologist? Ideally, each person should visit a  dermatologist once a year, or if you have skin conditions that require regular checks, you should plan to visit. What are the conventional services of a dermatologist? Dermatologists are physicians who assist patients in diagnosing and treating all types of skin problems. At Monaris Skin Clinic, our dermatologists can provide you with a consultation where you can learn more about your skin conditions and discuss the most suitable treatment. What is skin rejuvenation, and what does it do? Cosmetic treatments of rejuvenating the skin work towards restoring the beauty of your skin. They reduce dullness, fine lines, sun spots, and skin coloration. Dermatologists can prescribe chemical peeling, laser treatment, or advanced facials as per your needs to have your skin look healthier and younger. Are anti-aging procedures safe? The contemporary anti-aging procedures are safe in the hands of experienced dermatology experts. The FDA-approved options, such as Anti Aging Injections, dermal fillers, micro needling, and laser treatments, are customized to match your skin type. With these procedures, wrinkles can be reduced, elasticity can be improved, and your skin can achieve a youthful appearance with minimal downtime. Read More Best Dermatologist in Delhi & Indore — Monaris Skin & Hair Clinic Monaris Skin & Hair Clinic is one of India’s most trusted names in dermatology and aesthetic skin care — with clinics in Defence Colony, New Delhi and Vijay Nagar, Indore. Our team of qualified MD dermatologists delivers expert skin, hair and aesthetic treatments using FDA-approved technology and evidence-based protocols.

At our Delhi clinic, Dr. Arihant Surana — Medical Director and celebrity hair transplant surgeon with 22+ years of experience — leads a team that includes Dr. Geetali Kharghoria, AIIMS-trained dermatologist and Senior Consultant at Max Hospital. Together they deliver comprehensive dermatology, laser treatments, hair transplant and advanced aesthetic procedures for patients across South Delhi — including Lajpat Nagar, Defence Colony, Greater Kailash, Hauz Khas and Saket.

At our Indore clinic in Vijay Nagar, Dr. Swati Gupta and Dr. Pulkit Chaturvedi bring MD-level expertise in clinical dermatology, laser treatments, anti-ageing and hair loss management to patients across all of Indore. The same standards, the same technology, the same patient-first approach as our flagship Delhi clinic. Treatments at Monaris Our clinics offer the full range of medical and aesthetic dermatology — laser hair removal , anti-ageing treatments , dermal fillers , HIFU non-surgical facelift , pigmentation treatment , HydraFacial , acne treatment, hair transplant, Growth Factor Therapy (GFC) and more. All treatments are supervised by qualified MD dermatologists using FDA-approved technology. Two Clinics — Delhi & Indore Visit us at E-13, 1st Floor, Ring Road, Defence Colony, New Delhi 110024 or 3rd Floor, HQ Building, Satya Sai Square, Vijay Nagar, Indore 452010 . Both clinics are open Monday to Saturday 10 AM to 7 PM and Sunday 10 AM to 6 PM.
